Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Soulsmith foundry]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 12''' — The Soulsmith foundry is where Lindon has seen Fisher customers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 18''' — The room Lindon and his companions entered is a Soulsmith's foundry.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — The Soulsmith foundry is located at the top of the Transcendent Ruins.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — The Soulsmith's foundry is a state-of-the-art facility in Stormrock used to make and maintain Thousand-Mile Clouds and weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — The Soulsmith's foundry contains a dream tablet library of Soulsmith legacies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — The Soulsmith foundry in the Skysworn’s tower is advanced enough to support the creation of Truegold and Underlord constructs.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon booked time in the tower’s Soulsmith foundry.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon plans to add a Soulsmith foundry to Windfall.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon built a Soulsmith foundry that is a large, wooden, one-roomed structure resembling a barn.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
